akash.note: No Akash CLI, local wallet/config, container runtime, or deployment evidence was available before the timed stop.

human_actions_not_yet_requested: provide additional OIDC administration only if local Pomerium identities are insufficient

incidents.decision: Treat Zero CLI startup as stateful; make no further call until a genuine capability request and approval path are recorded.
incidents.summary: Zero help/version probe unexpectedly touched installed runtime state

pomerium.note: Pomerium 0.33.0 plus embedded Envoy allowed a candidate sandbox draft and denied hidden-label access with ext_authz_denied.

zero.decision_impact: Do not invent or import a stale token rate. Keep hosted per-token cost unavailable, retain exact usage counts, and reduce the official hosted suite to a compact stratified set under the USD 10 cap.
zero.note: Auth validity and funding not tested; wait for selected branch, uncertainty, and approved spend.
